mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS applyId, c.owner_id AS ownerId, u.nickname AS ownerName, c.name, c.category_id AS categoryId, COALESCE(cc.name, '') AS categoryName, COALESCE(c.intro, '') AS intro, COALESCE(c.avatar, '') AS avatar, CASE c.type WHEN 0 THEN 'PUBLIC' ELSE 'PRIVATE' END AS type, c.create_time AS applyTime, CASE c.status WHEN 2 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 3 THEN 'REJECTED' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS status FROM circle c LEFT JOIN circle_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.owner_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE c.status IN (2, 3) AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
